overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character with a backpack walking through a dark, rainy forest. The character approaches and enters a rustic wooden hut before continuing through the woods with a group of companions.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden walkway leading to rustic hut in rainy forest

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a wooden walkway toward a wooden hut entrance in the dark rain

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a raised walkway over dark water
rustic wooden hut with sloped roof and warm light emanating from doorway
tall dense pine trees surrounding the pathway
heavy rain falling through the scene creating atmospheric haze

segments.scene_description: The character walks alone along a wooden plank walkway through a dark, rainy forest. A rustic wooden hut with warm interior lighting stands ahead, surrounded by dense trees as heavy rain creates a moody atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior of wooden hut with warm lantern lighting

events.description: character enters the wooden hut from the rainy exterior, transitioning from cool to warm lighting
character exits the hut back into the dark rainy forest

agents.ego_description: passing through the wooden hut, entering from the rain and exiting to the forest on the other side

notable_agents.action: standing near the far doorway inside the hut, silhouetted against the exterior light

entered.detail: dimly lit interior with wooden walls, support beams, and scattered debris
orange glowing light source illuminating the hut interior
thick vertical wooden posts supporting the hut structure

segments.scene_description: The character enters the wooden hut, moving from the cold rain into a warm, sheltered interior with wooden beams and lantern light. After passing through the small structure, the character exits back into the dark forest where companions are waiting.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with companions in rainy woodland

events.description: exits the hut and joins a group of companions walking through the forest

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt forest path with a group of companions through the dark rainy woods

notable_agents.action: walking alongside the main character, keeping pace through the forest
walking ahead on the path, leading the group through the trees

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through dense forest undergrowth
thick cluster of tall pine trees creating a dark canopy overhead
large fallen tree trunk lying beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character joins companions walking along a dirt path through the dense, rainy forest. The group moves together through the dark woodland, with tall trees and thick undergrowth surrounding the trail as rain continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a solitary trek through a rainy forest into a brief moment of shelter before joining a group of companions. It begins with the character walking alone along a wooden plank walkway, moving through a dark, moody woodland toward a rustic hut glowing with warm interior light. As the character enters the structure, the scene shifts from the cold, heavy rain to a sheltered interior of wooden beams and lantern light, before the camera follows them back outside into the darkness. The environment then opens up as the character joins a group of companions on a dirt path, moving together through the dense undergrowth and tall trees as the rain continues to fall.
